gazette: Official Gazette Dated 30 June 2024 and Numbered 32588
title: The additional financial obligation on the import of wire rods has been converted into a definitive measure
bodyHtml:
The additional financial obligation (EMY) temporarily applied to the import of wire rods has been converted into a definitive measure. The measure will be applied in three periods until January 6, 2027.

The provisional safeguard measure applied as $175/ton EMY for 33 GTIP-covered products under tariff positions 7213 and 7227 has been converted into a definitive measure.

The products defined as wire rods from automat steels under tariff position 7213.20 and those defined as "types to be used in steel cords of outer tires" under GTIP 7213.91.20.00.00 are excluded from the measure.

In accordance with the Decision on the Application of Safeguard Measures in Wire Rod Imports (Decision No: 8693), which came into effect as of June 15, 2024, the tariff quotas opened for developing countries are determined as 38,898 tons for the first period of the measure; and 67,796 tons for the other periods.

Click here for the Decision on the Application of Safeguard Measures in Wire Rod Imports (Decision No: 8693).

Click here for the Notification on the Import Safeguard Measures (No: 2024/8) and the investigation report.
